_comment: Per-article meta for /writing/<slug> routes. Read at build time by scripts/inject-writing-meta.js to generate static HTML shells with correct social/SEO tags (since this is a CSR SPA, runtime meta tags from useSEO are invisible to non-JS scrapers). Add a new article by appending an entry below and rebuilding. ogImage is optional — null falls back to /og.png. Title + description here MUST match the per-route useSEO({...}) call in the corresponding essay component file; the postbuild script writes these into the prerendered HTML shell so SPA fallback and prerender stay in sync. `h1` is the exact H1 text required per route by the SEO spec (2026-02-12).

nothing-happened.title: Nothing Happened, and That Was the Point · Third Rail Systems
nothing-happened.description: Y2K was a fix delivered on time, so the disaster never came. The durable answer to exposure is the same: collect less in the first place.
nothing-happened.h1: Nothing Happened, and That Was the Point

the-switch.title: The Switch Someone Else Holds · Third Rail Systems
the-switch.description: Dependency is the vulnerability. Sovereignty is architectural rather than geographic, and relocating control is not the same as removing the need for it.

exposure-is-not-democratic.title: Exposure Is Not Democratic · Third Rail Systems
exposure-is-not-democratic.description: Collected data lands hardest on the most exposed. The capstone of the Exposure series, on the unequal distribution of disclosure risk.

by-direction.title: By Direction: The Agent Needs a Mandate, Not Your Identity · Third Rail Systems
by-direction.description: Who authorised the act, within what scope, and who answers for it. That was always the question, and it has an old answer.
by-direction.h1: By Direction: The Agent Needs a Mandate, Not Your Identity
